caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, a black t-shirt with the words "CHECK IT!" printed on it, and a gold chain necklace is seated in a studio setting. He is wearing large over-ear headphones and speaking into a professional microphone on a stand. Behind him, a white wall features a logo with the words "HUSTLE" and several gold stars. To his right, a screen displays the text "BOSS TALK 101" in large red and white letters. A smaller logo in the lower left corner reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Across the sequence, the man's expression shifts as he speaks, moving from a thoughtful gaze to the left, then speaking with his mouth open and gesturing with his hand, and finally settling into a steady gaze toward the right of the frame.
